speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You step forward and take a good long look at the fog that is slowly beginning to form at the base of the tunnel you guys are in. As you lean forward and take it in, the fog begins to form into a physical humanoid essence and reach out for you. For the three that are conscious, roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm pretty sure he just said bagel.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bagel?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. So, you guys take first watch, rest is till about 11PM or midnight or so. You guys finish. Who's taking second watch? All right, we've got Grog and Vax. All right so, you guys--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: While Percival is sleeping, I pull Grog over and we look at him for a while, and I say, where do you think the smoke comes out of?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's a good question.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you think it's the nostrils?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, it looked like it was coming from the bottom up, and there's only two holes down there, so it's either--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Either the dirt button--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It could just be his pores. You're right, it's probably--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's probably the periscope. You're right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys are having this conversation, the air down here, it's damp earth. It's chilled in the night, anyway, but it's a little warmer because you're under the ground, and it's absorbed some of the heat of the day. But it is getting noticeably colder.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's getting colder?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, just as the evening progresses. The temperature at night here--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Colder than it did last night? Because it also got pretty cold last night.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Comparable, yeah. There's a low mist begins to form within the tunnel from the temperature.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I wake up my sister.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What, what do you want?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's fog or something. What's going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's just cold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we see if it's magic?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an insight check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do that thing again. You can tell when stuff's around.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh good, I rolled a one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I do a nature check to show them it's just fucking fog?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, go ahead and roll.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, no damage. It's just going to grab you. And it goes in to attempt to go through your throat. You being prepared for this, having been subjected to this once before, you bring a dagger up towards its face and it just barely manages to pull out of the way before you thrust it up through the bottom of its neck. You manage to deflect the attack. All right, the people who just woke up, roll initiative, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Misses. You slap aside with your hand as you still try to pull the warhammer out of the wall, and then it gets clotheslined by the grip you have on it. It's going to try to strike you with its claws for the second attack. That's a ten. Yeah, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You (swish) out of its way, laughing in its face. The one against you, Percy, where you're on the ground prone. Oh okay, that'll be an 18?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm an 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It grabs you by the front of your shit and lifts you up with that hissing sound. Yeah, that'll be a 25. It pulls you in and sinks its fangs into the side of your throat. You can feel yourself gasp out in pain as the cold sensation pulses through your body, the actual life's blood being drained from you. Okay, you take four points of piercing damage, and you take eight points of necrotic damage, and your maximum hit points are reduced by eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I forgot I have advantage on strength checks when I'm raging.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wow, really?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's as if the gods defy you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you're now grappled and held there. It's pulling the blood out of your throat, you're caught off guard and completely just confused, frightened, and in serious pain at this moment. All right, and the one that's Hunter's Marked, that's against you. It's going to attempt to grab you. That's a 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that works.
